companyNameJapanese: 矽電半導体設備（深圳）股份有限公司
description: China's largest domestic prober station manufacturer. Founded 2003 in Shenzhen. First Chinese company to achieve mass production of 12-inch wafer probe stations. Products used in IC testing, optoelectronic chips, discrete devices, and third-generation compound semiconductors. IPO on ChiNext March 2025.

_externalRelationships.notes: 25.7% Chinese domestic prober market share (2023), #1 domestic manufacturer. Previously probers were monopolized by ACCRETECH (46%) and TEL (27%) globally. IPO on ChiNext (301629.SZ) March 24, 2025 at 52.28 CNY/share, first-day close +202% at 157.93 CNY. FY2022-2024 revenue: 399M/442M/546M CNY. Raised 5.45B CNY via IPO. Breaking Japanese monopoly in prober market.

_metadata.dataSource: Sina Finance, CE.cn, Xhby.net, open-source research reports
